title: megastachya ciliaris
intro: Megastachya ciliaris, also known as the Java grass or Java lemongrass, is a plant species native to Java, Indonesia, and is a type of tropical grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Megastachya ciliaris include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in some parts of the world. Megastachya ciliaris can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal supplements to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
